_comment: Background image slot definitions for newcastlehub.info skin system.
_comment2: wp_media_id = WP attachment ID. System resolves to URL automatically for URL-based replacements.
site_description: Newcastle Hub is a B2B digital services agency in Newcastle NSW, Australia. We build websites, set up POS systems, run SEO and digital marketing for local small businesses — restaurants, mechanics, hair salons, retailers, tradies.

slots.usage: Home page (page_on_front=403 'Home 2') hero section — full-width background. Stored as direct in raw HTML block, NOT as bg='ID' shortcode.
slots.default_prompt: Professional Newcastle Australia business team in a modern local office, wide landscape, natural light, welcoming atmosphere, warm neutral tones

slots.usage: Service page section hero (Marketing/Website/Hosting pages) — stored as bg='496' in [section] shortcode. White overlay 0.68 opacity applied. Image should work under light overlay.
slots.default_prompt: Newcastle Australia small business owner at work, professional services, local business environment, natural light, warm tones

slots.usage: About page main illustration — flat vector-style image of two people interacting with a desktop computer/search interface. Stored as direct in About page (ID 29). Should feel professional and human.
slots.default_prompt: Flat vector illustration of two professional people working together at a desktop computer, clean modern design, blue and purple accent colors, Newcastle digital services agency

slots.usage: Section background used behind portfolio/gallery content (blury-bg) — stored as direct URL in some pages. Used behind project thumbnails. Background must be subtle and low-contrast so foreground content (images, thumbnails) remains clearly visible. Prefer soft gradients or very light abstract textures.
slots.default_prompt: Soft abstract background, very subtle light gradient, low contrast, neutral light tones, clean professional backdrop
